summary: Iteration 134: Live PDF Preview Endpoint Tests - ALL 10 TESTS PASS. POST /api/invoices/preview-pdf correctly generates PDFs from unsaved form data. Returns application/pdf content type with valid PDF binary. Works with empty lines, handles discount calculations, fetches client data when client_id provided, and works without client_id. Supports FT, NC, PRV document types and exempt VAT rates (N3, N4). Authentication required (401 without session).

preview_pdf_endpoint.returns_pdf_content_type: PASS - Returns application/pdf with valid %PDF header (16131 bytes)
preview_pdf_endpoint.works_with_empty_lines: PASS - No crash with empty lines array (15040 bytes generated)
preview_pdf_endpoint.calculates_line_total: PASS - line_total = qty * price * (1 - disc/100) calculated server-side
preview_pdf_endpoint.fetches_client_data: PASS - Client info populated in PDF when client_id provided (16375 bytes)
preview_pdf_endpoint.works_without_client_id: PASS - PDF generated with empty client section (15662 bytes)

additional_tests.multiple_lines: PASS - Multiple line items render correctly
additional_tests.exempt_vat_rates: PASS - N3/N4 exempt rates handled correctly (VAT=0)
additional_tests.different_doc_types: PASS - FT, NC, PRV all generate valid PDFs
additional_tests.authentication_required: PASS - Returns 401 without valid session token
additional_tests.full_form_fields: PASS - All form fields (doc_number, dates, payment terms, notes) work

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/invoices/preview-pdf endpoint at lines 766-812 in invoices.py is well implemented
Line total calculation (lines 783-791) correctly applies: qty * price * (1 - discount/100)
Client fetching (lines 773-775) properly handles missing client_id with empty dict fallback
VAT calculation handles N3/N4 exempt codes correctly (line 790: vr=0 if N3/N4)
Uses generate_modern_invoice_pdf from pdf_invoice_modern.py via pdf_service
test_credentials: Test user/session/client created via mongosh setup fixture, cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Test user, session, client, and company_settings created per test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live PDF Preview backend endpoint verified working. POST /api/invoices/preview-pdf generates valid PDFs from unsaved form data. Frontend component LivePDFPreview.js uses this endpoint. Frontend testing skipped per instruction (Google OAuth required). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration134_preview_pdf.py can be reused for regression testing.
